ddls:
CREATE TABLE "ui_components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each UI component */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the UI component */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the UI component */,
  "required" INTEGER /* Indicates if the component is required */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value for the component if any */,
  "options" TEXT /* Options available for the component */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the component */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the component was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the component was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the component */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the component */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the component is active */,
  "contextual_conditions" TEXT /* JSON column to store complex conditions for rendering the component (e.g., user role, device type) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ui_components_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ui_components_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the UI component the property belongs to */,
  "property_name" TEXT /* Name of the property */,
  "property_value" TEXT /* Value of the property */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the property was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the property was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the property */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the property */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_properties_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES ui_components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_properties_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_properties_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_relations" (
  "relation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the UI component */,
  "related_component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related UI component */,
  "relation_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., parent-child, sibling) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the relationship */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_relations_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_relations_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES ui_components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_relations_related_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("related_component_id") REFERENCES ui_components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_relations_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the UI component */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the component */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was updated */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who updated the component */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Text column to store a brief description of changes made in the version */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* Indicates if the version is the current active version */,
  "rollback_possible" INTEGER /* Indicates if the version can be rolled back */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_versions_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES ui_components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_versions_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access control entry */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the UI component */,
  "role" TEXT /* User role */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access control was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access control was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the access control */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the access control */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_access_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES users ("role"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_access_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES ui_components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_access_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_access_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_dependencies" (
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dependency */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the UI component */,
  "dependent_component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component that depends on the UI component */,
  "dependency_type" TEXT /* Type of dependency (e.g., required, optional) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dependency was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dependency was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the dependency */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the dependency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_dependencies_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_dependencies_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES ui_components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_dependencies_dependent_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("dependent_component_id") REFERENCES ui_components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_dependencies_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_contexts" (
  "context_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contextual information */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the UI component */,
  "context_type" TEXT /* Type of context (e.g., device, user role) */,
  "context_value" TEXT /* Value of the context */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the context was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the context was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the context */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the context */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("context_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_contexts_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES ui_components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_contexts_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_contexts_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the UI component */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of metric (e.g., clicks, views) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was recorded */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who interacted with the component */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the user session */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_analytics_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES ui_components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_analytics_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, editor, viewer) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user last logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
